title: clerodendrum capitatum
intro: Clerodendrum capitatum, also known as the Cape Jasmine or Star Jasmine, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Clerodendrum capitatum include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating digestive issues, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used topically in the form of creams and ointments.
